title: WtAgeRe ebspollock example
text: vignette shows run weight--age model using examples/ebspollock dataset visualize anomalies.
code: library(WtAgeRe)  # Run ADMB model in the example directory (requires ADMB toolchain) setwd(here::here("examples", "ebspollock")) # system("make")  # Read predictions and plot anomalies (requires wt.rep) if (file.exists("wt.rep")) {   pred <- fn_get_pred(file = "wt", dat = NULL, source = "model")   fn_plot_anoms(pred) }

title: Get predicted weight-at-age — fn_get_pred
